name: Running Processes Audit (Windows)
description: List top CPU processes, enumerate paths, and flag processes running from temp/appdata/downloads.

tasks.name: Audit running processes
tasks.description: Capture top CPU processes, list process paths, and flag suspicious locations.

actions.name: Top CPU processes
actions.description: List top 20 processes by CPU usage with working set.
actions.command: powershell -Command "Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name, Id, CPU, WorkingSet"

actions.name: Process names and paths
actions.command: powershell -Command "Get-Process | Select-Object Name, Id, Path | Where-Object {$_.Path -ne $null}"

actions.name: Processes from temp/appdata/downloads
actions.description: Flag processes running from temp/appdata/downloads directories.
